rlevante 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Scoring and the model registry

Package index

All functions

ModelRecord-class ModelRecord
ModelRecord class definition
modelrecord() extract_scores() show(<ModelRecord>) AIC(<ModelRecord>) BIC(<ModelRecord>) logLik(<ModelRecord>) model_class() model_vals() items() scores() tabdata()
constructor helper
count_items()
count number of items with non-NA responses for each run
dedupe_items()
add identifiers for each instance of each item
fetch_corpus_items()
Get metadata for corpus items
fetch_item_mapping_fields()
Get item UIDs mapped by fields
fetch_item_mapping_id()
Get item UIDs mapped by item_id
fetch_item_mapping_trial()
Get item UIDs mapped by trial_id
fetch_registry_dir()
Fetch model registry file index table
fetch_scoring_parameters()
Fetch scoring specification table
fetch_scoring_table()
Fetch scoring specification table
fetch_survey_items()
Get metadata for survey items
fit_bylanguage_lang()
wrapper: given language, fit by_language model for each task
fit_bylanguage_task()
wrapper: given task, fit by_language model for each language
fit_task_models_multigroup()
for a given task and group variable, fit and record set of multigroup models
fit_task_models_pooled()
for a given task + subsetting variable/value, fit set of pooled models
generate_model_str_numeric()
generates mirt model strings
get_model_record()
get the model record indexed in registry_dir for a given scoring specification
get_model_spec()
get the scoring specification in scoring_table for a given task + dataset
get_registry_file()
fetch file from model registry
invariances
mapping from invariance names to corresponding mirt argument
link_surveys()
Link survey data to participant data
mirt_aic()
get AIC of fitted mirt model
mirt_bic()
get BIC of fitted mirt model
mirt_coefs()
get item parameters of fitted mirt model
mirt_scores()
get participant scores of fitted mirt model
mod_coefs()
extract item parameters from a model record
model_from_record()
given ModelRecord object, instantiate mirt model object
model_spec_filename()
convert model spec to filename
multigroup_coefs()
get coefficients for multigroup model
multigroup_extract_groups()
get groups out of multigroup model
multigroup_itemfit()
get item fits out of multigroup model
notebook_dataset()
Determine dataset of current notebook on Redivis
process_participants()
Process participants
process_runs()
Process run data
process_surveys()
Process survey data
process_trials()
Process trial data
process_trials_prelim()
Process trial data
recode_hf()
recode correctness + reclassify items for HF
recode_sds()
recode correctness for SDS
recode_slider()
recode correctness for slider
recode_tom()
recode items for ToM
recode_trials()
Recode trial correctness for scoring
recode_wrong_items()
recode correctness for items with wrong answers
remove_no_var_items()
remove items with no variance
remove_no_var_items_bygroup()
remove items with no invariance in any single group
remove_nonshared_items()
remove items that aren't shared across all groups
score()
score
score_cat()
scores from CAT
score_irt()
given trial data and model record, score data from corresponding model
score_pa()
scores for PA – deprecated
score_sre()
scores for SRE
to_mirt_shape()
format data for mirt
to_mirt_shape_grouped()
format data for mirt
